channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Four-winged dinosaur may have preyed on early birds
item.description: A newly discovered feathered dinosaur, Jianchangmaensis, might be the predator behind piles of crushed prehistoric bird remains.

item.title: Kombucha's tea type affects more than flavor
item.description: Scientists found that kombucha's flavor, chemistry, and antioxidant activity vary greatly depending on the tea used, with green and oolong showing distinct differences.

item.title: A rare interstellar visitor prompted a SETI search for alien technology
item.description: SETI scientists scanned the interstellar object 3I/ATLAS for radio signals that might indicate extraterrestrial technology, but found no evidence.

item.title: Scientists have finally solved how H5N1 bird flu hid in dairy cows
item.description: Researchers discovered that H5N1 bird flu attacks cows' udders rather than lungs because the virus's preferred receptors are concentrated in mammary tissue.
